IC Sessions.Regime_Consensus: Crypto: BEAR/UNCERTAIN/UNCERTAIN | IPO: CAUTIOUS | GDXJ: BROKEN
IC Sessions.Chair_Executive_Summary: No trades are being deployed today. All three silos are blocked: the crypto silo is in a transitional market regime with its algorithmic gate closed, the junior mining silo is in a broken regime with no valid gate readings, and the IPO shorts sub-committee issued a formal Do Not Proceed on candidate APXT despite high analyst conviction — the committee chair cannot override that verdict. For reconsideration, the IPO silo needs to achieve the required analyst consensus threshold, the crypto silo needs Bitcoin to establish a clear trend above or below its 200-day moving average, and the mining silo needs its gold, inflation, and volatility gate legs to return valid readings. Full capital of £48 remains available and undeployed.
IC Sessions.Chair_Governance_Record:
Session 20260406_IC — Main Committee Chair Review.

(1) SILO GATE STATUS AND REGIME:
— Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime TRANSITION (30% allocation). Algo gate CLOSED. BTC vs 200DMA and 90-day return data unavailable, consistent with a transitional market structure. Gate-blocked per standing rules; no candidate presented. Conviction 0/5.
— IPO Lock-Up Shorts: Regime not explicitly stated but sub-committee was operationally active. Candidate APXT identified with lock-up expiry 2026-04-25 and days-to-entry = 0, indicating the entry window is live. Despite high conviction (5/5), consensus reached only 67%, falling below the required threshold. Sub-committee returned DO NOT PROCEED. Per Chair authority, a DO NOT PROCEED from a sub-committee CANNOT be overridden (standing verdict rule).
— Junior Mining GDXJ: Regime BROKEN. All three gate legs (GLD, TIP, VIX) returned N/A, indicating a full gate failure. Gate-blocked. Conviction 0/5.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
All three silos are non-deployable this session. Crypto and GDXJ are gate-blocked by regime conditions. IPO Shorts returned a formal DO NOT PROCEED — the Chair has no authority to override this verdict regardless of conviction level.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention arises. No silo is proceeding. A-040 contention rules (C1–C3) are noted for completeness but are not triggered. Crypto coexistence rule (A-040-C2) is inapplicable as no TradFi or Kraken deployment is occurring.

(4) CAPITAL SUFFICIENCY AND EXCHANGE CAPS:
Total capital £48, deployed £0, available £48. Deployment cap (90%) = £43. 30% permanent off-exchange reserve (Revolut) = £14.40. No exchange exposure. All constraints satisfied trivially given zero deployment.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Portfolio heat = 0%. No open positions across any silo. Maximum 3 simultaneous positions cap is not approached.

(6) BULL OVERRIDE CHECK:
Not applicable. Crypto regime is TRANSITION, not BULL. Dual confirmation criteria (IC conviction ≥ 4/5 AND algo gate OPEN) cannot be met. Bull override not assessed.
IC Sessions.Monitoring_Items: CRYPTO: Monitor BTC vs 200DMA daily — regime must shift to BULL or BEAR for algo gate to open. TRANSITION regime blocks all deployment.; IPO SHORTS: APXT lock-up expiry 2026-04-25 remains on watch. Sub-committee returned DO NOT PROCEED with high conviction (5/5) but only 67% consensus — investigate dissenting analyst rationale before next session. Days to entry = 0 suggests entry window is live but committee blocked; clarify whether this is a timing, liquidity, or risk-factor veto.; GDXJ: BROKEN regime persists. Monitor GLD, TIP, and VIX gate legs for regime recovery. No action possible until at least two of three gate legs confirm.; PRIORITY HIERARCHY: All three silos remain well below 25 filtered trades threshold. Provisional A-040 hierarchy (IPO → GDXJ → Crypto) remains in effect. Flag for revalidation when any silo approaches 25 filtered trades.; CAPITAL: £48 total, £0 deployed, full availability confirmed. No exchange exposure or deployment cap concerns at this time.

IC Sessions.Regime_Consensus: Crypto: UNCERTAIN/UNCERTAIN/CRASH | IPO: CAUTIOUS | GDXJ: BROKEN
IC Sessions.Chair_Executive_Summary: All three silos are blocked this session: Crypto is in a macro headwind regime with its gate closed, Junior Mining is in a broken regime with no valid data, and the IPO Shorts sub-committee returned a do-not-proceed on DNMX with very low conviction of 1 out of 5. No capital is deployed and no trades are authorised today. The most important near-term catalyst to watch is DNMX, whose lock-up expires on 27 April 2026 — fifteen days from now — and which could become actionable if the IPO sub-committee conviction rises to at least 3 out of 5 in sessions approaching that date. For any silo to proceed, its regime must recover and its gate must open with sufficient analyst conviction.
IC Sessions.Chair_Governance_Record:
Session 20260412_IC — Main Committee Chair Final Briefing (post Deputy Chair challenge). Date: 2026-04-12. Total capital: £48. Deployed: £0. Available: £48. Deployment cap (90%): £43. Cooldown tier: NORMAL (100% of Fixed Bet). Capital Gate: 100% tier — no capital restriction applies. Kill Switch proximity metrics confirmed clear: Loss 0% vs 40% threshold (CLEAR); Win rate N/A vs 30% minimum (no completed trades, not triggered); Max gain 0% vs 100% threshold (CLEAR); Trades completed 0 vs 24/36 thresholds (well within bounds). No open positions. Portfolio heat: 0%.

(1) SILO GATE STATUS AND REGIMES:
Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime MACRO_HEADWIND (0% allocation). Algo gate CLOSED. BTC vs 200DMA and 90-day return data unavailable this session. Verdict: GATE BLOCKED. No deployment possible.
IPO Lock-Up Shorts: Regime not gate-blocked by regime classification, but sub-committee returned DO NOT PROCEED with conviction 1/5 and 100% consensus on that low conviction. Candidate DNMX has lock-up expiry 2026-04-27 — this is 15 calendar days from today (2026-04-12). The lock-up has NOT yet expired. Entry window is not yet open.
Junior Mining GDXJ: Regime BROKEN. All gate legs (GLD, TIP, VIX) returning N/A. Verdict: GATE BLOCKED. No deployment possible.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
All three silos returned either DO NOT PROCEED or GATE BLOCKED. No silo issued a PROCEED or CONDITIONAL verdict. Per verdict rules, the Main Committee verdict is DO NOT PROCEED.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention applicable. No silo reached PROCEED status. A-040 contention rules are noted for record but not triggered this session. Crypto coexistence rule noted: crypto uses independent Kraken capital and does not compete with TradFi (IG) capital pool.

(4) CAPITAL SUFFICIENCY AND EXCHANGE CAPS:
No deployment occurring. Exchange exposure cap (70% on any single exchange) is not at risk. 30% permanent off-exchange reserve (Revolut) is intact. All constraints satisfied.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Zero positions open. Portfolio heat 0%. No heat concern.

(6) STANDING MONITORING ITEMS:
DNMX lock-up expiry 2026-04-27 (15 days). GDXJ regime recovery watch. Crypto regime and gate watch. Kill switch and cooldown tier confirmed clear. Priority hierarchy revalidation not yet triggered (0 filtered trades across all silos). A-040 provisional hierarchy on record.

IC Sessions.Regime_Consensus: Crypto: UNKNOWN/UNKNOWN/UNKNOWN | IPO: UNKNOWN | GDXJ: UNKNOWN
IC Sessions.Chair_Executive_Summary: No trades are being deployed this session. All three silos returned non-proceed verdicts: Crypto is blocked by a MACRO_HEADWIND regime, IPO Shorts failed the consensus threshold despite maximum analyst conviction, and Junior Mining returned an anomalous UNKNOWN verdict despite passing all gate checks. For reconsideration, the most actionable change would be the IPO sub-committee achieving the required consensus threshold on CEPV before its lock-up expiry on 2 May 2026, or the GDXJ sub-committee resolving its procedural anomaly and returning a valid verdict. A formal governance gap has been raised requiring all silo administrators to begin reporting cumulative filtered trade counts each session.
IC Sessions.Chair_Governance_Record:
Session 20260415_IC — Main Committee Chair Final Briefing (post Deputy Chair challenge, severity MEDIUM, all points addressed).

(1) SILO GATE STATUS AND REGIMES:
Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: Regime MACRO_HEADWIND, allocation 0%. Algo gate CLOSED. BTC vs 200DMA and 90-day return data not supplied — silo administrator to confirm whether this is expected under MACRO_HEADWIND or a reporting gap. GDXJ: All three gate legs passed (GLD=PASS, TIP=PASS, VIX=PASS) but sub-committee returned UNKNOWN verdict with 0/5 conviction and N/A consensus. Gate passage without a verdict is a procedural anomaly requiring investigation. IPO Lock-Up Shorts: No gate leg data reported; sub-committee proceeded to verdict.

(2) SUB-COMMITTEE VERDICTS:
Crypto Mid-Cap Spot: DO NOT PROCEED. Conviction 5/5, consensus 100%. Candidate AAVE ($102.85, +7.8% 7d) was identified but regime gate blocks deployment. Verdict is binding — Chair cannot override. IPO Lock-Up Shorts: DO NOT PROCEED. Conviction 5/5, consensus 67%. Candidate CEPV (lock-up expiry 2026-05-02, days to entry 0). Failure mode is consensus threshold only — conviction is not the limiting factor. Required consensus threshold must be confirmed in writing by silo administrator for audit clarity. Verdict is binding. GDXJ: UNKNOWN. Conviction 0/5, consensus N/A. Not a PROCEED; treated as non-deployable this session.

(3) CONTENTION ANALYSIS:
No contention applicable. No silo returned PROCEED. A-040 priority hierarchy (IPO Shorts → GDXJ → Crypto Mid-Cap) was not triggered. Crypto coexistence rule not triggered. Bull Override (A-040 Rule 4) evaluated: crypto regime is MACRO_HEADWIND (not BULL) and algo gate is CLOSED — both required conditions absent. Override inapplicable. Check was performed and cleared, not skipped.

(4) CAPITAL SUFFICIENCY:
Total capital £48. Deployment cap 90% = £43.20. Available £48. 30% permanent off-exchange reserve (Revolut) = £14.40. Exchange exposure cap 70% = £33.60. Capital Gate fully open at 100%. No capital constraint would have blocked deployment had any silo returned PROCEED. Capital sufficiency confirmed.

(5) PORTFOLIO HEAT:
Zero open positions confirmed explicitly. No hold expiry monitoring required. Portfolio heat 0%. Maximum 3 simultaneous positions — constraint not approached.

(6) KILL SWITCH AND OPERATIONAL CHECKS:
Kill Switch framework assessed: all four metrics (loss %, win rate %, max gain %, trades completed) are at zero or baseline. No Kill Switch proximity threat. Cooldown tier NORMAL — no additional sizing restrictions beyond deployment cap. Capital Gate 100% open — confirmed non-restrictive.

(7) GOVERNANCE GAP — PRIORITY HIERARCHY REVALIDATION:
The A-040 provisional priority hierarchy revalidation trigger (25 filtered trades per silo) cannot be tracked because silo administrators have not reported running trade totals. This is elevated from a monitoring note to a formal governance gap. All three silo administrators must report cumulative filtered trade counts each session effective immediately.

(8) VERDICT:
All three silos returned non-PROCEED verdicts (two DO NOT PROCEED, one UNKNOWN). Verdict is DO NOT PROCEED.
